sprint: Identity Gate -- No Separate Title, Bigger Guarding Lumo, Named Speech Reveal
task: A direct follow-up to the Full Redesign: 'we can remove this line, we have ample space, we can bring bigger lumo may be in a flying or guard position animated. i like the line show me your stars add the kids name there. and let the line reveal as a lumo speaking it to the kid.' Removed the separate 'Prove it's you, <name>!' title line outright; folded the kid's name into the gatekeeper's own speech line instead ('Show me your stars, <name>!', or a generic 'traveler' fallback for the Recall path where no identity is known yet). Grew Lumo's portrait/ring/fallback glyph via a clamp()-sized --gk-size (88-132px, viewport-relative so it still shrinks correctly on a short screen) into the vertical room the removed title freed up. Built a 'flying/guard' read from three synchronised CSS animations on the existing static art -- a slow float+rotate drift, a rotating/pulsing watch-ring, and a shrinking/fading landing shadow -- all skipped under prefers-reduced-motion. The greeting now types itself into a new speech-bubble one character at a time via _typewriterReveal(), with a blinking cursor, reading as Lumo genuinely speaking it. While re-verifying the no-scrollbar guarantee against the bigger header, found and fixed two real, pre-existing overflow bugs the bigger header surfaced but didn't cause: the tap board's own width formula used a flat 92vw cap that never accounted for the panel's real padded width (overflowed at narrow+tall viewport shapes like 420x700) -- fixed by swapping to a plain 100% (a flex item's percentage width resolves against its true containing block); and the Recall path's typed-code input had no min-width:0, so its default intrinsic minimum blocked it from actually shrinking inside its flex row, overflowing ~30-47px whenever expanded -- fixed with one min-width:0. Verified via a width/height sweep (8 combinations including both previously-broken shapes) showing zero overflow everywhere, the existing 29-assertion pattern-challenge suite extended to 33 (title line gone, bigger portrait present, correct name/fallback in the speech line), and a real screenshot. Both goldenBuild.js suites pass unchanged. Confined to css/style.css and js/magicCardUI.js.
